member.name: T:CalculatorApp.Entities.Calculator
member.summary: Provides basic arithmetic operations, including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
member.remarks: This class is designed for simple integer arithmetic. It supports operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Division by zero is not allowed and will result in a .

member.name: M:CalculatorApp.Entities.Calculator.Add(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds two integers and returns the result.

member.name: M:CalculatorApp.Entities.Calculator.Subtract(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Subtracts the second integer from the first integer.
member.param: The minuend, which is the number to be subtracted from.
The subtrahend, which is the number to subtract.

member.name: M:CalculatorApp.Entities.Calculator.Multiply(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Multiplies two integers and returns the result.

member.name: M:CalculatorApp.Entities.Calculator.Divide(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Divides one integer by another and returns the result.
member.param: The divisor. Must not be zero.
